_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib in Children with Inoperable Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: with the exception of the Pain Interference Index and the measurements of visual acuity, the other outcome measures that were used have not yet been validated for the population with neurofibromatosis type 1
details: Validated for use in neurofibromatosis type 1 population
